description: Brand contract for the Limos single-offer quantity-stepper starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Single-offer quantity selector and upsell includes support full-price, compare/current, unit-plus-total, and savings presentations through SDK display nodes.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: Quantity-stepper-first single offer selector with data-next-bundle-qty-for controls; do not force Olympus tier cards into checkout.
family_inventory.order_bump: Optional order-bump variants are valid only when prepurchase packages exist.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Offer includes use upsell_offer or upsell_bundle_tiers with a visible price row above the accept CTA.

exit_pop.behavior: The starter checkout includes exit-intent-popup.html by default; strip it or wire it to CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent/promo_code_input before launch.
